Artifact Stat

StatFlat all damage
Value range105 all damage to 210 all damage
RaritySpecial
UpgradeableYes
Drop weight4
Eligible levels50-80
Approx. type odds0.23%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Flat all damage is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Big Metal Scrap40-90
Engine Part4-9

Related Artifact Variants

  • Omni Enhancer
  • Exceptional Omni Enhancer
